name_cn:
# Hot Selling #
Model 547965 Size 22*29*15
Backpacks are always an essential part, presented in various styles, made of high-end PVC material with woven leather trim. Embellished red and green woven strap details on the back of the bag, black mesh on the back of the strap, and double G accessories design. These classic elements always keep this bag full of vitality.
